strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience with diverse tech stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, D, C++, etc.)
Proven track record of building scalable systems and infrastructure (e.g., AI-agent frameworks, Kubernetes deployments, low-latency microservices)
Entrepreneurial mindset with startup and open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: Limited direct AI/ML expertise or products built specifically with AI (mentions AI-agent *infrastructure* but not AI models or algorithms)
No advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields despite 15+ years of experience
AI-related work appears secondary to general software engineering roles (no clear focus on AI strategy or cloud AI platforms)
response.justification: Aisha has strong software engineering credentials with 15+ years of experience, including leadership in scalable systems and infrastructure. However, her resume lacks direct evidence of AI/ML model-building or strategic AI platform work—critical for this role. While she contributes to AI-agent *infrastructure* (e.g., MCP code generators), this does not fully align with the job's focus on AI strategy and cloud AI platforms. Her entrepreneurial experience and broad technical skills are assets, but the gap in AI-specific expertise is a significant concern.
